gemini_critique.critique: Model A's analysis provided more comprehensive and accurate interpretations of the course text, particularly regarding the broader implications of tax policy and international tax cooperation. My initial assessment missed several key connections.

SDG_16 (Peace, Justice and Strong Instit.reason: Model A's reasoning on tax law, compliance, and anti-illicit flows (Targets 16.3, 16.4, 16.6) is highly accurate and directly supported by the course content.

SDG_17 (Partnerships for the Goals).reason: Model A correctly highlighted the course's strong relevance to domestic resource mobilization and international tax cooperation (Target 17.1, 17.14).
